title: Extract g11n Target
description: Extract g11n target options for Build Facade.

outputPath.description: Path where output will be placed.

outFile.description: Name of the file to output.

format.description: Output format for the generated file.

exclusionKeyPrefixes.description: List of key prefixes to remove after i18n extraction

backUpExcludedKeys.description: Whether to create a backup of excluded keys in a separate file.
